REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1891 48th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-29-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for Janice Prevetti (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $950,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 2, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
